category_sources: source_facts.description identifies the project as .NET Core; dotnet is the SDK/runtime command.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Microsoft .NET site; source_facts.name is dotnet.
docs_sources: Official Microsoft Learn documentation is the canonical documentation for .NET and the dotnet CLI.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/dotnet/dotnet; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.executables identify the .NET runtime/SDK command-line toolchain.
